name: research-memory-protocol-template
description: Local-first research memory protocol for AI agents, Obsidian, and MCP.

scripts.smoke:fake: printf '%s\n%s\n' '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{}}' '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_projects","arguments":{}}}' | env RESEARCH_MEMORY_ROOT="$PWD/examples/fake-obsidian-vault/科研规范_v1.0" RESEARCH_MEMORY_BOOTSTRAP="$PWD/templates/BOOTSTRAP.md" node mcp/research-memory-mcp.mjs
